assertions.description: The design uses two cascaded 74HC595 shift registers (U1, U2) driven via SPI-like signals (SCLK, RCLK, SER) to address a 32KB AT28C256 parallel EEPROM (U3). The schematic uses nets named SCLK, RCLK, SER, ~CE, ~OE, ~WE, and IO0-IO7. Despite clear memory bus signals and a parallel EEPROM footprint, `signal_analysis.memory_interfaces` is empty. The 74HC595 serial-in/parallel-out shift registers driving parallel address lines represent a recognizable address-expansion pattern.
